title: Muffin's Sniffer
description: Add Sniffer from Minecraft Mob vote 2022
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) # Muffin's Sniffer Add Sniffer from Minecraft Mob vote 2022! ## Sniffer - 15 Hearts (30 HP) - Can be bred by Wheats, Potatoes, Carrots and Beetroots. - Give them a Wheat seed, Pumpkin seed, Melon seed or Ancient Grass seed, so they will dig the dirt and drop a Ancient Grass Seed. - Can be ride and loves carrot on a stick just like pigs! - Drop a red wool when they dies. ## Items ### Sniffer egg Sniffer egg can be found at pretty high chance in any kind of ocean ruined. Place on sand to continue progress on hatching. Same as turtle eggs! ### Ancient Grass Seed Place on grass to grow a Ancient grass block. ## Blocks ### Ancient Grass Decorative block. Can be bonemeal to grow into Tall Ancient Grass block. ### Tall Ancient Grass Decorative block. Can be bonemeal to drop Ancient Grass Seed.
